steps.action: Run: python3 scripts/nim_router.py invoke --capability embed --text "sample text"
steps.observed: Command executed but received 404 response - API authentication failed due to missing API key

issues.detail: The NVIDIA_API_KEY environment variable is not set. The command executed and made a request to https://ai.api.nvidia.com/v1/embeddings but received a 404 response, likely because the API gateway rejected the unauthenticated request.

blockers.description: NVIDIA_API_KEY not available in environment - cannot authenticate with NVIDIA NIM API
blockers.quickFixAttempted: N/A - environment limitation, not a code defect

summary: Tested VAL-EMBED-003: assertion BLOCKED - NVIDIA_API_KEY is not set in the environment, which is required to authenticate with the NVIDIA NIM API. The command executed and constructed a valid API request but received a 404 response due to missing authentication.
